retrieved_result: Cost of Living "Cost of Living Download .xls COST OF LIVING OVERVIEWOur cost of living indices are based on a US average of 100. An amount below 100 means Columbus, Ohio is cheaper than the US average. A cost of living index above 100 means Columbus, Ohio is more expensive. Columbus, Ohio cost of living is 84.30.
